# AT+CMGR response fixtures — PDU message read
# Format: AT+CMGR=<index>  →  +CMGR: <stat>,<alpha>,<length>\r\n<pdu>\r\nOK
# One response block per line pair (header + PDU), separated by blank lines.
#
# Typical received SMS (GSM7, sender +4915112345678, body "Your OTP is 391827")
+CMGR: 1,"",32
07914306073011F0040B914951211032F70000230627122052800AC8329BFD06DDDF723619
OK

# Multi-part SMS — first segment
+CMGR: 1,"",152
07914306073011F0440B914951211032F700002306271220528079050003010201C8329BFD06DDDF723619CD268341E5F27C1E3F2F0BC5C3697DD6F7A185E96BB40D7B5CEE77BB401D5DAE8FE96BB40D7B5CEE77BB401D5DAE8FE96BB40D7B5CE
OK

# SMS in UNREAD state (stat=0)
+CMGR: 0,"",28
07914306073011F0040B914951211032F700002306271220528012C8329BFD06DDDF723619
OK

# Empty SIM slot — no message at index
+CMS ERROR: 321

# Stored outbound SMS (stat=2, MO-SENT)
+CMGR: 2,"",24
07914306073011F011000B914951211032F70000AA0CC8329BFD06DDDF7236
OK
